translations.app.title: BrickBot
translations.tools.title: Tools
translations.tools.profiles.title: Profiles
translations.tools.profiles.description: Create, edit, switch, and delete game-target profiles.
translations.tools.captures.title: Captures
translations.tools.captures.description: Grab a frame from the target window, crop a region, save as a template PNG.
translations.tools.detections.title: Detections
translations.tools.detections.description: Author named, typed vision rules: progress bars, elements, effects, sprites. Bind to ctx & events.
translations.tools.actions.title: Actions
translations.tools.actions.description: Fire any brickbot.action(...) registered by the running script.
translations.actions.title: Registered actions
translations.actions.help: Actions are registered from running scripts via brickbot.action(name, fn). Click "Run" to invoke one.
translations.actions.empty: No actions registered. Start a Run that calls brickbot.action(...).
translations.capture.insertPoint.tip: Insert {x, y} for the hovered pixel
translations.capture.insertColor.tip: Insert vision.colorAt(x, y) for the hovered pixel
translations.capture.insertRoi.tip: Insert {x, y, w, h} for the dragged rectangle (use as a roi: option)
translations.capture.savedAndInserted: Template saved and inserted at cursor
translations.capture.openEditor: Open the Scripts editor to insert.
translations.capture.hoverFirst: Hover over the image first to pick a point.
translations.capture.cropFirst: Drag a rectangle on the image first.
translations.capture.detect.title: Detect
translations.capture.detect.testThis: Test this template against the current capture
translations.capture.detect.bar.needRoi: Drag a rectangle on the image to set the strip ROI.
translations.capture.detect.bar.needTemplate: Pick a template that frames the bar.
translations.capture.crop.title: Crop & insert
translations.capture.empty.title: No frame captured yet
translations.capture.empty.hint: Pick the target window above, then press Capture.
translations.detection.selectProfile: Select a profile to manage detections.
translations.detection.list.title: Detections
translations.detection.list.empty: No detections yet. Pick a kind from + Add to start one.
translations.detection.editor.title: Editor
translations.detection.editor.empty: Pick a detection from the list, or add a new one to start editing.
translations.detection.empty.title: No frame captured yet
translations.detection.empty.hint: Pick the target window above, then press Capture frame.
translations.detection.colorPickWrongKind: Color pick only applies to Color Presence / Progress Bar kinds.
translations.detection.needName: Give the detection a name first.
translations.detection.field.name: Name
translations.detection.field.templateEdge: Match bar bbox by edges (recommended for variable fill)
translations.detection.field.edgeDiff: Edge diff (ignores color/lighting drift, only flags shape changes)
translations.detection.matchMode.colorHint: Strict pixel match — fastest but breakable by color/light shifts.
translations.detection.matchMode.grayscaleHint: ~3× faster than color; some accuracy loss on color-discriminated UI.
translations.detection.matchMode.edgeHint: Compares Canny edges only — survives color drift, lighting, variable fill.
translations.detection.placeholder.name: e.g. HP Bar, Buff Up, Boss Spawn
translations.detection.region.hint: Region kind has no detection logic — its result IS the resolved ROI. Other detections can reference this one via the Linked ROI source.
translations.detection.editor.train.tip: Drop labeled samples and let the trainer derive color, tolerance, and direction.
translations.detection.train.title: Train detection from labeled samples
translations.detection.train.upload: Drop sample images here or click to upload.
translations.detection.train.hintBar: Drop several screenshots of the bar at known fill ratios. Label each with the fill (0..1).
translations.detection.train.hintGeneric: Drop labeled samples for the trainer.
translations.detection.empty.firstTimeHint: Click "Train new" to walk through capturing samples and letting the system figure out the right config.
translations.detection.train.setup.title: What kind of detection?
translations.detection.train.samples.title: Capture or upload samples
translations.detection.train.samples.hint: Need at least 2. Label each — for this kind:
translations.detection.train.roi.title: Where is the thing?
translations.detection.train.roi.hint: Drag a rectangle on the sample, or auto-detect dynamic regions from your recording.
translations.detection.train.run.title: Train & tune
translations.detection.train.save.title: Output bindings & save
translations.detection.train.save.hint: Wire the detection result into your scripts. Leave fields blank to skip.
translations.detection.train.kindDesc.progressBar: Track HP / MP / cooldown fill. Train with screenshots at different fill levels (e.g. 0.1, 0.5, 1.0).
translations.detection.train.kindDesc.template: Find a UI icon: buff, alert, button, debuff. Train with positives (visible) and negatives (absent).
translations.detection.train.kindDesc.colorPresence: Count colored markers: loot drops, glowing enemies, marked tiles. Train with screenshots labeled with the count.
translations.detection.train.suggestNeedsMulti: Capture at least 2 frames to suggest dynamic regions.
translations.detection.train.samplesNotSaved: Detection saved, but training samples failed to persist.
translations.detection.train.label: Label
translations.detection.train.autoDistribute.tip: Spread labels evenly from 0 to 1 across samples (capture order).
translations.detection.train.applyAll.tip: Set every sample's label to the current value.
translations.detection.train.kbHint: ↑/↓ or J/K to cycle samples · 0–9 to set label
translations.errors.DETECTION_TRAIN_NEEDS_POSITIVES: Element training needs at least one positive (label = true) sample.
translations.errors.DETECTION_TRAIN_ELEMENT_NEEDS_ROI: Element training needs an ROI on the first positive sample (or a seed ROI).
translations.errors.DETECTION_TRAIN_DETECTION_REQUIRE: Saving training samples needs a detection id.
translations.errors.DETECTION_TRAIN_EFFECT_NEEDS_BOTH: Effect training needs both quiet and trigger samples.
translations.capture.templateDescription.placeholder: What this captures, when to use it...
translations.errors.TEMPLATE_NOT_FOUND: Template "{{id}}" not found in the active profile.
translations.errors.TEMPLATE_DECODE_FAILED: Could not decode the uploaded PNG ({{bytes}} bytes).
translations.errors.DETECTION_TRAIN_NEEDS_SAMPLES: Training needs at least {{min}} labeled samples.
translations.errors.DETECTION_TRAIN_KIND_UNSUPPORTED: Training is not implemented for kind "{{kind}}".
translations.errors.DETECTION_TRAIN_INVALID_LABEL: Sample {{index}} label "{{label}}" must be a number between 0 and 1.
translations.errors.DETECTION_TRAIN_DECODE_FAILED: Could not decode a training sample image.
translations.detection.roi.anchorHint: Coords are offsets from this corner. Right/bottom anchors take negative offsets to move inward.
translations.detection.roi.linkedHint: Uses the parent's match bbox as this ROI. Inset margins shrink it inward.
translations.detection.bar.bboxHint: Either select a template that frames the bar, or leave the template blank and use the ROI section above to anchor / link the bbox.
translations.detection.field.lineThresholdHint: Fraction of pixels per orthogonal line that must match the fill color for that line to count as filled.
translations.detection.output.eventOnChangeOnly: Emit event only on value change
translations.settings.title: Settings
translations.settings.theme.tooltip: Light, dark, or follow the OS preference.
translations.settings.logLevel.tooltip: Backend file-log verbosity. Lower levels include all higher levels.
translations.settings.annotationLevel.tooltip: How much in-app help text to show.
translations.settings.theme.label: Theme
translations.settings.language.label: Language
translations.settings.logLevel.label: Log Level
translations.settings.annotationLevel.label: Tooltip Detail
translations.settings.window.resetTooltip: Reset window size and position to defaults
translations.settings.reset.label: Reset All Settings
translations.settings.reset.confirmDescription: This will revert theme, language, and all settings to defaults.
translations.profile.title: Profiles
translations.profile.create.title: New Profile
translations.profile.empty: No profiles yet — create one to get started.
translations.profile.delete.confirmDescription: All scripts, templates, and config for this profile will be removed. This cannot be undone.
translations.profile.duplicate.title: Duplicate Profile
translations.profile.field.name: Name
translations.errors.PAYLOAD_FIELD_NULL: Required field "{{key}}" must not be null.
translations.errors.SCRIPT_NOT_COMPILED: Script {{kind}}/{{name}} has no compiled output. Save it from the editor first.
translations.errors.VISION_FRAME_DECODE_FAILED: Failed to decode the captured frame ({{bytes}} bytes).
translations.errors.CAPTURE_FRAME_TIMEOUT: WinRT capture timed out waiting for a frame from the target window.
translations.errors.DETECTION_INVALID_ID: Detection id "{{id}}" is invalid (use letters, numbers, underscores, dashes).
translations.errors.DETECTION_NOT_FOUND: Detection "{{id}}" not found in the active profile.
translations.errors.DETECTION_OPTIONS_MISSING: Detection of kind "{{kind}}" needs its options block populated.
translations.errors.DETECTION_TEMPLATE_NOT_FOUND: Template "{{template}}" not found in the profile.
translations.errors.DETECTION_ROI_REQUIRED: Detection "{{id}}" needs a region of interest set.
translations.errors.DETECTION_PROGRESSBAR_NEEDS_ROI_O: Progress-bar detection "{{id}}" needs either a template or an explicit ROI (anchored or from another detection).
